name: Bunlight Architecture Blueprint
description: Strict architectural mapping of responsibilities across Bun, Rust, and Zig domains.

responsibilities: Public API surface (Browser, Page, Locator, Frame)
forbidden: Raw TCP socket manipulation for CDP (delegated to standard ws)
Intensive regex parsing of large HTML strings

responsibilities: DOM Parsing and CSS Selectors via lol_html (libbunlight_rust_bridge)
High-performance HTML to Markdown conversion (AI token reduction)
OS-level signal handling and process reaping
Historical static DOM parsing (Now entirely wrapped/replaced by Rust lol_html bridge for safety and speed)
zig.status: Deprecated/Replaced by Rust bridge (`src/ffi/zigquery.ts` acts as a polyfill interface to Rust).

integration.subprocess: WebSocketTransport spawns bunlight-engine or local Chrome via Bun.spawn

guidance_for_agents: NEVER write slow Regex parsing for HTML in TypeScript. Port it to the Rust bridge.
ALWAYS compile Windows Rust targets with MSVC, static CRT, and Fat LTO.
